item.description: Got COVID this weekend - it's absolutely awful. So I've been going through my old cosplay archives to kill some time and plan future sets! I'm still very happy with my how my Jessica Rabbit turned out :D

item.dc:creator: DrForester

item.title: Ukraine
item.description: No, this is not footage from George Orwell's "1984" and not "City-17", this is occupied Mariupol. There is no sewage, water, electricity, or gas in the city. Ninety percent of houses in the city are damaged or destroyed. Corpses on the streets have begun to decompose because of the heat, which can provoke epidemics of various diseases. People stand in huge queues for humanitarian aid, which is barely enough. It is impossible to move around the city without special passes issued in special filtration camps. If the occupation administration wouldn't like the person, he will be left in the camp for an indefinite period, may be put to forced labor, or may be taken to another city or to Russia. Now Russia has brought large screens to Mariupol on which it broadcasts its propaganda: about how bad Ukraine is and how Russia is a liberator.
item.dc:creator: jefffffffffffffffffffffffff

item.title: Meme Dump 3 with Kitty Tax
item.dc:creator: Dandy8291

item.title: First publication rejection. Time to celebrate!
item.description: Wrote a book. Still editing but my mean-brain has been telling me all kinds of nonsense. Mostly that my story is shit and I shouldn’t even try publishing it. So I submitted! I was immediately rejected (which is good ‘cause I’m still editing for crying out loud!) but acceptance wasn’t the aim. I heard those shitty lies, accepted my fear, and actively chose to me courageous. Fuck you, depression!
item.dc:creator: sifujerry

item.title: Finally made it to the Harry Potter Cafe in Seoul, South Korea and test flew the new Nimbus 2021. Just wanted to share a milestone of my time in Korea with you all. Peace and love, yall.
item.description: Edit: Wow guys!! Did not expect this!! Y?all are awesome! Peace, Love, and Positivity to all (originally posted by @ONLYSAYSPOWER on 2021-05-31 11:59:41)

item.title: Same thing
item.description: Not that I am all that thrilled about spending billions to fund a foreign war when our own vets aren't being taken care of, and when we have a housing crisis here at home, but what a stupid ass comment. https://twitter.com/mchooyah/status/1531423834288574464?t=SNFf3LKZ6GLMyHfFZxGxpQ&s=19
